title: ✨ The Studio Vault Expands!
message: We've added powerful new tools to elevate your 3D Card experience.
points: 📄 PDF Import Support: Extract high-res pages directly from your PDF documents.
📸 3D Snapshot Export: Capture and share crisp images of your cards with full 3D physics applied.
🎛️ Hardware Gyroscope: Tilt your phone to organically explore the sheen and reflections of your cards.
🗂️ Multi-Page Architecture: Add unlimited pages to a single project and flip through them seamlessly.

title: 🚨 Critical Core Patch
message: A required update to patch rendering engines for newer Android devices.
